title: Replace events deck hash with shared deckhash utility
description:
pkg/events/deck_matchup.go defines a local deckHash/normalizeDeckNames hashing path (SHA256 + truncated 12-char output) that duplicates canonicalization/hash concerns already centralized in pkg/deckhash. This drift risk is high because normalization rules can diverge silently from leaderboard/fuzz storage dedup behavior. Refactor events hash generation to use a shared helper from pkg/deckhash (or a small wrapper there for truncated IDs), and keep one normalization contract.

Files:
- pkg/events/deck_matchup.go
- pkg/deckhash/hash.go
- pkg/events/parser_test.go (and related tests)

Acceptance:
1) No local SHA256/join implementation remains in events package for deck IDs.
2) Event deck hash behavior is covered by tests for normalization/collision expectations.
3) Hashing contract is documented once in pkg/deckhash.
close_reason: Implemented via PR #87 (shared deckhash helper + events reuse)

title: Unify API token resolution across cmd runtime commands
description: Several command runtimes still manually call os.Getenv("CLASH_ROYALE_API_TOKEN") and hand-build missing-token errors despite existing helpers in cmd/cr-api/api_helpers.go. Affected callsites include cmd/cr-api/fuzz_commands.go, cmd/cr-api/discover_commands.go, cmd/cr-api/deck_research_eval_runtime.go, and cmd/cr-api/deck_eval_batch_runtime.go. Refactor to use one token-resolution helper with consistent offline hints and error text.

title: Deduplicate fuzz stored-deck player-context hydration
description: cmd/cr-api/fuzz_commands.go duplicates storage query + API token + player context loading logic in deckFuzzListCommand and deckFuzzUpdateCommand (around lines ~1740 and ~1860). Extract a shared helper that sanitizes tag, resolves token, fetches player context, and reuses query option assembly to reduce drift and simplify testing.

title: Extract shared discover command flag/config builders
description: cmd/cr-api/discover_commands.go defines nearly identical flag sets for "discover start" and "discover run" (around lines ~172 and ~242), then manually re-serializes many of the same values again in runDiscoveryInBackground (around lines ~949+). Create shared builders for discovery flags and forwarded args so defaults/validation live in one place. Include regression tests for CLI parity between start/run/background paths.

title: Consolidate offline analysis loaders for suite vs single deck flows
description: cmd/cr-api/deck_builder_config_runtime.go:loadPlayerDataOffline and cmd/cr-api/deck_compare_suite_runtime.go:loadSuitePlayerDataFromAnalysis share nearly identical analysis-dir resolution, latest-analysis load, and player-name/tag fallback logic. Extract a shared offline loader helper to reduce drift and simplify tests.
notes:
Implemented in branch codex/refactor-offline-player-data-loader (commit d5f4adf):
- Added shared helper loadOfflineDeckPlayerData in cmd/cr-api/player_analysis_runtime.go for analysis-dir defaulting, file/latest load selection, and player name/tag fallback.
- Updated loadPlayerDataOffline and loadSuitePlayerDataFromAnalysis to consume helper while preserving command-specific logging.
- Added unit tests for default analysis dir, explicit analysis file path, and wrapped load errors in cmd/cr-api/player_analysis_runtime_test.go.
Validation:
- go test ./cmd/cr-api -run "TestLoadOnlinePlayerAnalysisPreservesEvolutionLevels|TestLoadSuitePlayerDataFromAPIUsesSharedDeckAnalysis|TestLoadOfflineDeckPlayerDataDefaultsDirAndFallbacks|TestLoadOfflineDeckPlayerDataUsesExplicitFile|TestLoadOfflineDeckPlayerDataWrapsLoadErrors" (pass).
- golangci-lint focused scan still reports pre-existing fuzz_commands complexity/funlen findings unrelated to this refactor.

title: Deduplicate online player-analysis mapping in CLI runtime
description: loadPlayerDataOnline and loadSuitePlayerDataFromAPI repeated the same online analysis-to-player-data mapping. Extracted shared helper loadOnlineDeckPlayerData in cmd/cr-api/player_analysis_runtime.go and updated both call sites to use it. This removes duplicated API mapping logic and deletes the remaining nolint:dupl in deck_builder_config_runtime.go.
notes: Validation: GOCACHE=/tmp/go-build-cache GOMODCACHE=/tmp/go-mod-cache go test ./cmd/cr-api -run 'TestLoadOnlinePlayerAnalysisPreservesEvolutionLevels|TestLoadSuitePlayerDataFromAPIUsesSharedDeckAnalysis|TestConvertToDeckCardAnalysisPreservesEvolutionFields' passed.
close_reason: Completed in branch codex/refactor-online-player-data-loader (commit d080981); extracted loadOnlineDeckPlayerData and updated both runtime call sites.

title: Migrate remaining CSV exporters to shared helper pattern
description:
analysis.go, cards.go, and archetypes.go still duplicate exporter setup and type assertion boilerplate. Migrate them to assertCSVExportType/writeCSVRows for consistency with recently refactored player/battle/events exporters.

Candidate files:
- internal/exporter/csv/analysis.go
- internal/exporter/csv/cards.go
- internal/exporter/csv/archetypes.go

title: Extend shared CSV helpers to battle/player/events exporters
description:
After completing clash-royale-api-w8o, player.go, battle.go, and events.go still duplicate exporter construction and type-assertion boilerplate. Migrate these remaining CSV exporters to assertCSVExportType/writeCSVRows for consistency and reduced drift.

Candidate files:
- internal/exporter/csv/player.go
- internal/exporter/csv/battle.go
- internal/exporter/csv/events.go
close_reason: Completed: migrated player/battle/events exporters to shared type-assert and CSV write helpers

title: Roll out shared CSV export helpers to remaining exporters
description:
After clash-royale-api-zzt introduced assertCSVExportType/writeCSVRows, analysis/cards/archetypes exporters still duplicate type-assert + BaseExporter wiring. Migrate remaining CSV exporters to shared helpers to fully remove repeated boilerplate and keep error formatting consistent.

Candidate files:
- internal/exporter/csv/analysis.go
- internal/exporter/csv/cards.go
- internal/exporter/csv/archetypes.go
close_reason: Completed: migrated analysis/cards/archetypes CSV exporters to shared type-assert and row-write helpers

title: Extract shared compare-output section renderers
description:
compare_format_table.go, compare_format_markdown.go, and compare_format_report.go repeat the same conceptual rendering loops for best-in-category lines, deck card grids, and verbose defense/attack/synergy sections. This duplication increases drift risk whenever evaluation fields or wording changes.

Candidate extraction points:
- cmd/cr-api/compare_format_table.go:89-103,121-159
- cmd/cr-api/compare_format_markdown.go:69-117
- cmd/cr-api/compare_format_report.go:128-213

Refactor target: shared section data builders + small format-specific emitters so only style differs by output format.
notes: 2026-04-23 triage: current main (f36d74a) already has shared compare formatter helpers and no dupl/gocognit/gocyclo/funlen findings in cmd/cr-api. Re-verify issue scope and close if no remaining formatter duplication risk.
close_reason: Verified resolved on current main (f36d74a): shared compare formatter helpers merged via PR #84; no remaining duplication findings in focused lint triage.

title: Consolidate CSV exporter type-assertion and write boilerplate
description:
CSV export functions repeat the same pattern: type assert input, build rows, instantiate BaseExporter with literal filename, and write to subdir. The repetition makes it easy to diverge on error handling and output paths.

Repeated locations include:
- internal/exporter/csv/player.go:68-79,172-204
- internal/exporter/csv/battle.go:45-56,135-155
- internal/exporter/csv/events.go:25-41,73-113

Refactor target: helper utilities for typed export execution + shared file writer wiring while preserving existing headers and row shapes.
close_reason: Implemented shared assert/write helpers and migrated player/battle/events CSV exporters

title: Extract shared suite summary mapper for build/analyze runtimes
description: Both runPhase1BuildDeckVariations and deckBuildSuiteCommand build deck.SuiteDeckSummary slices with near-duplicate field mapping. Add shared helpers in cmd/cr-api/deck_build_runtime.go to convert suite deck records into SuiteDeckSummary to reduce duplication and drift while preserving output behavior.

title: Repair stale beads references in suite runtime nolint comments
description: cmd/cr-api/deck_analyze_suite_runtime.go still references non-existent task ID clash-royale-api-1g1r in nolint rationale. Update to live issue IDs and add a lint check script to detect stale clash-royale-api-* references.
notes:
2026-04-23 triage on main (f36d74a): stale beads IDs are repo-wide, not just one file. Missing IDs found in nolint comments: clash-royale-api-1g1r, clash-royale-api-sb3q, clash-royale-api-sg50. Affected files: deck_analyze_suite_runtime.go, deck_optimize_runtime.go, deck_budget_runtime.go, deck_build_runtime.go, deck_evaluate_runtime.go, deck_possible_count_runtime.go, deck_recommend_mulligan_runtime.go, deck_builder_config_runtime.go. Recommended scope update: audit all clash-royale-api-* references and add a check script/CI guard for missing IDs.
2026-04-24 triage on current main (f36d74a): revalidated stale issue-ID references remain unchanged across 8 runtime files (1g1r/sb3q/sg50). No additional stale IDs found in cmd/ or internal scans; issue remains actionable for scripted validation + ID remediation.

title: Extract shared suite deck-build orchestration pipeline
description: runPhase1BuildDeckVariations in cmd/cr-api/deck_analyze_suite_runtime.go duplicates strategy/variation build loop, deck save, and summary assembly logic already present in buildAllStrategies in cmd/cr-api/deck_build_runtime.go. Extract shared orchestration helpers for build loop + suite summary generation to reduce drift and complexity.
notes:
2026-04-22 triage: repository-wide dupl/gocognit/gocyclo/funlen scan is clean after current fuzz_commands refactor; this issue remains a structural duplication candidate in suite orchestration.
2026-04-23 triage on main (f36d74a): targeted lint scan is clean, but runPhase1BuildDeckVariations still exists as a large orchestration path and remains a structural dedup candidate vs deck_build_runtime pipeline.
2026-04-24 triage on current main (f36d74a): focused duplication lint remains clean (dupl/gocognit/gocyclo/funlen = 0), but runPhase1BuildDeckVariations still duplicates orchestration flow from deck_build runtime at a structural level; keep open for manual extraction refactor.

title: Deduplicate offline analysis loading across CLI runtimes
description: Refactor cmd runtime loaders to reuse analysis_helpers.loadOfflineAnalysisFromFlags instead of duplicating file/tag fallback logic in suite and builder paths.
close_reason: Completed: runtime loaders now reuse loadOfflineAnalysisFromFlags in suite and builder paths

title: Resolve pre-existing golangci-lint issues in cmd/cr-api/fuzz_commands.go
description:
Surfaced by 'task lint' on 2026-05-04 (branch codex/refactor-shared-local-db-paths). Pre-existing on main; unblocked by the datapath refactor (clash-royale-api-x7h) but not introduced by it.

Findings:
- fuzz_commands.go:1791  errcheck: storage.Count() return error is discarded.
- fuzz_commands.go:1931  funlen: reevaluateStoredDecks is 63 lines (>60).
- fuzz_commands.go:1691  gocognit: deckFuzzListCommand cognitive complexity 30 (>20).
- fuzz_commands.go:1811  gocognit: deckFuzzUpdateCommand cognitive complexity 24 (>20).

Acceptance:
1) 'task lint' exits 0.
2) Behavior of fuzz list/update/reevaluate paths unchanged (covered by existing cmd/cr-api tests).

title: Deduplicate discover state directory path builders
description: discover state/checkpoint directory defaults are duplicated across cmd/cr-api/discover_commands.go and pkg/deck/discovery_checkpoint.go despite pkg/deck/discovery_paths.go already centralizing the base path. Refactor to route defaults through deck.DiscoverySessionBaseDir() to reduce drift.
notes: Implemented shared discover state-dir usage in cmd/cr-api/discover_commands.go and pkg/deck/discovery_checkpoint.go; both now call deck.DiscoverySessionBaseDir().
close_reason: Refactor merged into branch codex/refactor-discover-state-dir; tests passed; PR #90 opened.

title: Unify per-user database path construction for local data stores
description:
Per-user storage path assembly is duplicated across cmd and storage packages (e.g., cmd/cr-api/leaderboard_commands.go manual ~/.cr-api/leaderboards path building, pkg/leaderboard/storage.go path composition, and pkg/fuzzstorage/storage.go default path composition). Introduce a shared path builder utility for ~/.cr-api roots and store-specific filenames so path rules and sanitization stay consistent.

Files:
- cmd/cr-api/leaderboard_commands.go
- pkg/leaderboard/storage.go
- pkg/fuzzstorage/storage.go

Acceptance:
1) Path construction for local db files uses shared helper(s).
2) Player tag sanitization remains delegated to playertag.Sanitize.
3) No behavior change in resulting file locations.
notes: 2026-05-02 automation run: implemented shared local DB path helper in internal/datapath and refactored pkg/fuzzstorage/storage.go, pkg/leaderboard/storage.go, and cmd/cr-api/leaderboard_commands.go to use it; added internal/datapath/datapath_test.go; targeted tests passed (go test ./internal/datapath ./pkg/fuzzstorage ./pkg/leaderboard ./cmd/cr-api). Unable to commit/push in /Users/klauer/dev/clash-royale-api because .git/index.lock exists and this environment blocks removing lock files, so PR creation is currently blocked.
close_reason: Shared ~/.cr-api path helpers landed in internal/datapath (commit 899b806); pkg/leaderboard, pkg/fuzzstorage, and cmd/cr-api/leaderboard_commands.go now consume them. Tests pass.

title: Extract shared sqlite close/log helper for storage packages
description:
Both pkg/fuzzstorage/storage.go and pkg/leaderboard/storage.go implement identical closeWithLog helpers and near-identical sqlite init scaffolding. Extract a shared internal helper package for safe close logging and common storage setup patterns to reduce duplicated error-handling code and future drift.

Files:
- pkg/fuzzstorage/storage.go
- pkg/leaderboard/storage.go
- new internal helper package (e.g., internal/storageutil)

Acceptance:
1) closeWithLog is defined once and reused by both packages.
2) Existing behavior/log messages are preserved.
3) Existing storage tests remain green.
close_reason: Implemented shared storageutil.CloseWithLog helper; tests passed; PR opened

title: Prune unused phased-refactor structs/helpers in suite/evaluation runtime
description: Multiple runtime files carry nolint:unused markers for deferred refactors (deck_analyze_suite_runtime.go, deck_compare_suite_runtime.go, deck_eval_batch_runtime.go, deck_eval_format_runtime.go, pkg/deck/evaluation/analysis.go). Audit which items are still reachable, remove dead code, and keep only compatibility shims that are externally required.
